headline: Keysight (KEYS): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Keysight has been on fire lately. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has rocketed 68.1%, reaching $284.50 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
